free_text: Search for low-yield products in the neutron-induced
neutron flux above 32S (n,p) thresh = 10% of TH

isolate fission products. Identification by gamma
spectra,purity test by beta decay curves.
The 99Mo yield was used as internal standard.
The decay curves were analyzed by least square fit. The
obtained activities were then corrected for chemical
yield, decay, counting efficiency and target volume.
The resulting isotopic yields were corrected for inde-
pendent yields to get the total isobaric yields.
